title: ficaria calthifolia subsp. grandiflora
intro: Ficaria calthifolia subsp. grandiflora is a subspecies of the Lesser Celandine plant, known for its beautiful yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Ficaria calthifolia subsp. grandiflora include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Ficaria calthifolia subsp. grandiflora can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
